subcodes.first_line: His Holiness 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar penned this epistle in response to one who had inquired regarding the truth of the matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت علی قبل اکبر این رساله درجواب شخصی که از حقیقت حال سوال نموده بود
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
